name: otg-field-cost-app
description: Instacart Cart Tech Operations - Field Cost App (Technician persona, v0.1)

scripts.reset: rm -f data/otg.db data/otg.db-shm data/otg.db-wal && node --experimental-sqlite --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning seed.js
scripts.seed:demo: rm -f data/otg.db data/otg.db-shm data/otg.db-wal && node --experimental-sqlite --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning seed-demo.js
scripts.seed:policy: rm -f data/otg.db data/otg.db-shm data/otg.db-wal && node --experimental-sqlite --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning seed-policy-test.js
scripts.seed:director: rm -f data/otg.db data/otg.db-shm data/otg.db-wal && node --experimental-sqlite --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning seed-director-demo.js
scripts.build:web: cd redesign/react-app && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build:web
